live.lineNote: Low-snow risk · Confirm before you go

transit.title:
25 minutes
from New Chitose Airport.
transit.lead: About 25 minutes by car from New Chitose Airport—one of Hokkaido's closest ski areas to the terminal. A niche ~1.5-hour private-powder stop between flights with virtually no lift lines. JR Muroran Line Oiwake Station is ~5 km away; Nukumori-no-Yu combo tickets available.
transit.imgAlt: Long turns on an empty run—ideal practice at Abirayama Ski Area

primary.title: Rail-side slopes near the airport
primary.lead: A town-run hill along the Oiwake tracks—25 minutes from New Chitose Airport plus snow views beyond the crossing make a rare transit location. Empty runs perfect for a quick powder session.
primary.imgAlt: Abirayama Ski Area beside the railway—Oiwake tracks and snow

secondary.title: ¥1,700 private powder
secondary.lead: Adult day ticket ¥1,700; Abira town kids aged 3–15 ski free. About one-fifth of Tomamu's lift price on uncrowded local terrain—built for a short ski between flights.

nap.title:
Rest-hut lunch,
local flavors.
nap.lead: Free rest hut and snack shop—then stretch into Abira udon or cheese-country dining. With ~1.5-hour average stays, the value is the town loop after skiing, not the hill alone.
nap.imgAlt: Rest-hut shop—local lunch and hot drinks after skiing

recovery.title:
After skiing,
Nukumori-no-Yu.
recovery.lead: Day-use bath Nukumori-no-Yu in central Oiwake. The Nukumori set (adult ¥1,700) bundles lift and soak—Airport · Powder · Onsen for a short pre- or post-flight trip.
recovery.noticeBody: At 166 m with natural snow only, seasons can start late or close early. On-site ski and snowboard rentals available—Web guides for hands-free airport packages. Always check snow before you go.

trip.title:
A powder stop
around your flight.
trip.lead: Arrival afternoon or departure morning—a model ~1.5-hour powder stop 25 minutes from New Chitose Airport.

01.title: New Chitose Airport
01.body: Rental car or taxi ~25 min after landing

02.title: Private powder
02.body: One pair lift, five courses, ~1.5 hours

03.title: Rest-hut lunch
03.body: Shop snack or Abira udon in town

05.title: Back to airport
05.body: ~25 min to CTS. Make your flight

transit.title: Complete Transit Snow guide
transit.body: 25 minutes from New Chitose Airport—don't compete head-on with Tomamu or Teine; sell private powder in the gap before or after your flight. Pair Oiwake Station access and Nukumori sets for a global transit rebrand.

night.title: Night skiing suspended
night.body: Night operations are currently suspended due to aging lighting (day skiing until 16:00). Full replacement would require major investment—for now, focus on daytime transit demand around flights.

handfree.title: How to visit hands-free
handfree.body: Bundle on-site rentals with the Nukumori set for an airport all-in-one package. Always verify snow cover before departure—when lifts can't run, guide snowshoe tours and other alternatives.

access.note: ~25 min by car from New Chitose Airport · ~5 km from JR Oiwake Station (taxi ~5 min)
